MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Thomas Borbely, Esq., appeared for Cross-Defendant & moving party: Barri Electric, Inc.
Francis Shehadeh, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff & opposing party: Buck Bartholomew

Ruling After Hearing:
Cross-Defendant Barri Electric, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Responses. The motion is granted as to Interrogatory Numbers 20, 25, and 26.
The motion is granted as it seeks further responses to Form Interrogatory Number 17.1. The responses are inadequate. The motion is denied as it seeks an order deeming Requests For Admissions admitted.
As to Demand for Production, Numbers 7 and 8 are Granted for period 2/12-2/13/05 noon - Denied as to No. 9 - Interrogatories No. 28 is Denied, No. 27 is Granted. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
